commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete mpijob -n yanxi-validation nccl-tests-efa --ignore-not-found=true'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio delete pod -n yanxi-validation --all --force --grace-period=0 2>&1 | tail -5'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pods -n yanxi-validation'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke -o wide'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio logs -n yanxi-validation gpu-smoke 2>&1 | tail -40'
